headline: Is It Time To Revisit Cigna Group (CI) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Wondering if Cigna Group at around US$271 per share still offers value or if the best opportunity is behind it? This breakdown is designed to help you frame that question clearly. The stock has edged up 0.5% over the last week and 4.0% over the last month, even though the year to date return sits at a 2.8% decline and the 1 year return is a 16.1% decline, with a 3 year return of 10.7% and a 5 year return of 17.5%. These price moves come as investors continue to reassess large health insurers...
